notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

Source directly supports that Feng Jiuge went to Shilian Island, met Honglian will, and accepted Honglian true inheritance. This is private knowledge between Feng Jiuge and Honglian's will, not known to other天庭 members like Ziwei仙子 or Chen Yi. The fact is hidden from the player at this point in the story.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
凤九歌对天庭下手（ptr_1）和未告知紫薇仙子（ptr_6）是可见行为，但动机不明。方源传音内容（ptr_4）引发凤九歌思考，但无法确定其真实动机是脱离天庭还是另有图谋。仅凭行为无法做出一阶推断，不宜编造动机。
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed focuses on individual actions of Feng Jiuge (凤九歌) - his personal conflict with Fang Yuan, his inheritance from Hong Lian, and his ambiguous relationship with Heavenly Court (天庭). While Feng Jiuge is a member of Heavenly Court, the seed does not establish a collective faction/group stake. The relation '凤九歌对天庭下手' suggests individual action against Heavenly Court, not a faction pressure. No named family, clan, or organization (other than Heavenly Court as a backdrop) has a concrete stake in the seed facts. Feng Jiuge's daughter Feng Jinhuang is mentioned only as his charge, not as a collective actor. Hong Lian's will is an individual remnant, not a faction. Cannot derive a collective pressure candidate from this material.
IF export filter quarantined 11 legacy old-schema branches.
